message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 3 more modules to factory pattern - Phase 4 DRY

Convert constant generator functions to h.c(), h.I64(), h.err() factories:

- nt_mod.zig: 321→70 lines (-251 lines, 52 constants)
- ssl_mod.zig: 255→59 lines (-196 lines, 42 constants)
- winreg_mod.zig: 345→69 lines (-276 lines, 57 constants)

Total Phase 4 savings: ~723 lines
Total DRY work savings: ~2,915 lines
